title: Converting Outlook 365 Exchange account that used Owl Exchange to Thunderbird EWS
creator: ccctriplec
content:
Hello! Over the last few years, I was using Owl Exchange to access my school and work email accounts which couldn't be added regularly.

Now that I've upgraded, I'm not able to add these accounts using the EWS method. I run into all kinds of errors, or Thunderbird is unable to detect the kind of account.

Yet, my existing IMAP accounts work great with Owl. How can I easily convert these to work with Thunderbird EWS natively?
metadata: ;useragent:Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64; rv:150.0) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/150.0;tb_version:150.1;os:Windows 10/11

title: Blank Tabs on top of page
creator: signedbooks
content:
Good afternoon!

We use Thunderbird for our business across several computers. However, on the main computer, we've suddenly received blank tabs at the top of the page, as if an open email thread is there. There are about ten or so of these blank open tabs, and you cannot exit them. The X button doesn't work on them, nor does Ctrl + W.

I've uninstalled and reinstalled the software, and we've tried a shutting everything down and restarting the computer, but nothing seems to get rid of the tabs.

Is this an issue others have experienced and, if so, what's the best remedy for it?

Thanks in advance!
metadata: ;useragent:Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/147.0.0.0 Safari/537.36;tb_version:140.10.1esr 32-bit;os:Windows 10
